description: Style Note Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted  leatherette  handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Product Details Black handbag made of leatherette Has two short handles to carry ease and style  Two main compartments with one compartment with a zippered pocket and another compartment with organizer sleeves Branding embossed on the front Metal feet on base Material and Care Leatherette Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 18 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 10 cm
